headline: 1 of Wall Street’s Favorite Stocks for Long-Term Investors and 2 We Avoid
summary: Wall Street is overwhelmingly bullish on the stocks in this article, with price targets suggesting significant upside potential. However, it’s worth remembering that analysts rarely issue sell ratings, partly because their firms often seek other business from the same companies they cover.

headline: Why Universal Health Services (UHS) Stock Is Up Today
summary: Shares of hospital management company Universal Health Services (NYSE:UHS) jumped 5.3% in the afternoon session after the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services (CMS) proposed a 2.4% payment rate increase for hospitals.
